Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Vandenyas]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Vandenyas is a place Jyrine might be from.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 22''' — The Blackwatch traitor has the naturally tan skin of Vandenyas heritage.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — A Vandenyas-style breakfast is heavy on bread and fruit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — Vandenyas is a destination Calder Marten intends to sail for.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — Vandenyas is a location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Vandenyas is the home of a carpenter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 10''' — Vandenyas is the ancestral homeland of Jerri.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Jyrine has the caramel skin of Vandenyas.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 27''' — Vandenyas has a Navigator-style ship that can traverse the Deep Aion.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
